summary.en: A TikTok-style app that teaches languages through personalized short-form videos.
summary.zh: 一款 TikTok 風格的應用程式，透過個人化短影音教授語言。

highlight.en: Parrot reframes doomscrolling as language practice with a personalized short-video feed, where power users watch up to six hours a week.
highlight.zh: Parrot 把無止盡滑手機重新定位為語言練習，提供個人化短影音動態，重度使用者每週觀看可達六小時。

summary.en: Intelligent media storage that consolidates creative teams' file tools into one platform.
summary.zh: 智慧型媒體儲存平台，將創意團隊的檔案工具整合於單一平台。

highlight.en: Aspect replaces five separate media tools with one workspace covering ingest, streaming, review, sharing, and archiving, plus an agent that understands the asset library.
highlight.zh: Aspect 以單一工作區取代五種獨立媒體工具，涵蓋檔案匯入、串流、審核、分享與封存，並內建能理解素材庫的代理人。

summary.en: An AI-powered platform that automates remote care management for Medicare patients.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的平台，為 Medicare 病患自動化遠端照護管理。

highlight.en: Kaigo uses age-friendly phone calls to run post-discharge follow-ups and check-ins, combining patient responses, voice biomarkers, and monitoring data for preventive care.
highlight.zh: Kaigo 以對長者友善的電話進行出院後追蹤與定期關懷，結合病患回覆、語音生物標記與監測數據以提供預防性照護。

summary.en: Continuous AI penetration testing that finds and fixes security vulnerabilities.
summary.zh: 持續性的 AI 滲透測試，找出並修復資安漏洞。

highlight.en: Founded by members of the top US competitive hacking team, Veria builds AI agents that uncover deeper vulnerabilities faster than human researchers.
highlight.zh: 由美國頂尖競技駭客團隊成員創立，Veria 打造的 AI 代理人能比人類研究員更快找出更深層的漏洞。

summary.en: An AI-native platform for mainframe operations and modernization.
summary.zh: AI 原生的主機（mainframe）營運與現代化平台。

highlight.en: Hypercubic helps enterprises understand and rebuild legacy mainframes from the 1960s–90s that still run core systems at roughly 70% of the Fortune 500.
highlight.zh: Hypercubic 協助企業理解並重建 1960–90 年代的老舊主機系統，這些系統至今仍支撐約七成財星 500 大企業的核心業務。

summary.en: Next-generation vision foundation models that bring intelligence to manufacturing.
summary.zh: 次世代視覺基礎模型，為製造業帶來智慧化。

highlight.en: Allus builds vision foundation models that let factories see, understand, and improve production in real time.
highlight.zh: Allus 打造視覺基礎模型，讓工廠能即時觀察、理解並改善生產流程。

summary.en: Fully autonomous robotic factories that make scaling hardware as easy as scaling cloud.
summary.zh: 全自主機器人工廠，讓硬體量產像擴展雲端一樣輕鬆。

highlight.en: Built by Berkeley robotics researchers who won a full-scale autonomous IndyCar race at 160mph, Tensr aims to make hardware scaling as effortless as scaling on AWS.
highlight.zh: 由曾以時速 160 英里贏得全尺寸自駕 IndyCar 賽事的柏克萊機器人研究員打造，Tensr 致力讓硬體量產像在 AWS 上擴展一樣輕鬆。

summary.en: An AI engine that automates and routes internal engineering operations workflows.
summary.zh: 自動化並分派內部工程營運流程的 AI 引擎。

highlight.en: Rovr acts as an AI front desk that replaces internal forms and Slack triage by understanding requests, assigning owners, and posting status updates into Slack.
highlight.zh: Rovr 作為 AI 前台，能理解需求、指派負責人並將狀態更新發布到 Slack，取代內部表單與人工 Slack 分流。

summary.en: Autonomous AI that automates AI research and development at scale.
summary.zh: 自主 AI，大規模自動化 AI 的研究與開發。

highlight.en: Thesis treats scientific discovery as a combinatorial search problem, aiming to help researchers find the next AlphaFold or Transformer faster and more systematically.
highlight.zh: Thesis 將科學發現視為組合搜尋問題，目標是協助研究人員更快、更有系統地找出下一個 AlphaFold 或 Transformer。

summary.en: Large-scale real-world robot and human datasets for training embodied AI.
summary.zh: 用於訓練具身 AI 的大規模真實世界機器人與人類資料集。

highlight.en: Cortex supplies frontier labs with egocentric human video, robot trajectories, and human-in-the-loop evals, and pays workplaces to host data-collection sessions via its marketplace.
highlight.zh: Cortex 為前沿實驗室提供第一人稱人類影片、機器人軌跡與人類介入評估，並透過市集平台付費讓工作場域代為舉辦資料收集。

summary.en: A planning workspace where engineering teams align on what to build before coding.
summary.zh: 讓工程團隊在動工前對齊開發內容的規劃工作區。

highlight.en: Scott AI addresses the fact that coding agents made writing code fast, but teams still disagree on what to build, providing a planning layer before agents start.
highlight.zh: Scott AI 著眼於：程式碼代理人讓寫程式變快，但團隊仍對該做什麼意見分歧，因此提供在代理人動工前的規劃層。

summary.en: An AI browser that completes real work across the websites you already use.
summary.zh: 能在你既有網站上完成實際工作的 AI 瀏覽器。

highlight.en: Aside uses the web the way people do—turning browsing history into local memory and autofilling credentials without exposing secrets—and ranks #1 on Online-Mind2Web, BU-Bench-V1, and Odysseys.
highlight.zh: Aside 像人一樣使用網路，將瀏覽紀錄化為本機記憶並在不洩漏密鑰的情況下自動填入帳密，並在 Online-Mind2Web、BU-Bench-V1 與 Odysseys 等基準上排名第一。

summary.en: An open-source code understanding platform for massive codebases.
summary.zh: 面向龐大程式碼庫的開源程式碼理解平台。

highlight.en: Used by engineers at NVIDIA, Red Hat, and Wikimedia, Sourcebot lets developers and AI agents instantly regex-search and ask questions across millions of lines of code on-prem.
highlight.zh: Sourcebot 已被 NVIDIA、Red Hat 與 Wikimedia 的工程師採用，讓開發者與 AI 代理人能在地端即時以正規表達式搜尋並查詢數百萬行程式碼。

summary.en: AI-powered creation and distribution of sports highlight videos.
summary.zh: 以 AI 製作並發布運動精華影片。

highlight.en: Narrative automates high-quality sports highlight production and distribution for broadcasters, teams, and leagues.
highlight.zh: Narrative 為轉播商、球隊與聯盟自動化製作並發布高品質運動精華影片。

summary.en: A full-stack AI financial audit firm that automates internal auditing.
summary.zh: 全端 AI 財務稽核公司，自動化內部稽核流程。

highlight.en: Denki performs audit work as 99% software, working on existing systems like AuditBoard and Workiva to collect evidence, run walkthroughs, and record every step for SOX compliance.
highlight.zh: Denki 以 99% 軟體執行稽核工作，可在 AuditBoard、Workiva 等既有系統上收集證據、進行流程查核，並記錄每一步以符合 SOX 規範。

summary.en: Building the future of trusts for attorneys, RIAs, fintechs, and family offices.
summary.zh: 為律師、RIA、金融科技公司與家族辦公室打造信託的未來。

highlight.en: Sava is building infrastructure for trusts and estates, serving attorneys, RIAs, fintechs, and family offices.
highlight.zh: Sava 為信託與遺產業務打造基礎設施，服務對象涵蓋律師、RIA、金融科技公司與家族辦公室。

summary.en: Biological foundation models trained on noisy, unstructured datasets to design gene therapies.
summary.zh: 在嘈雜、非結構化資料上訓練的生物基礎模型，用於設計基因療法。

highlight.en: Exonic builds biological foundation models for messy data, and in 2025 used AI to set a new state of the art in liver cancer targeted gene therapy validated in vitro.
highlight.zh: Exonic 為雜亂資料打造生物基礎模型，並於 2025 年以 AI 在肝癌標靶基因療法上創下新標竿，並通過體外實驗驗證。

summary.en: An AI healthcare concierge that delivers cost-effective care to employees via text.
summary.zh: 透過簡訊為員工提供高性價比照護的 AI 醫療管家。

highlight.en: Rovi's AI agents analyze clinical data to identify care needs, treat common conditions virtually, and find in-network providers, cutting employer healthcare spend by 10–20%.
highlight.zh: Rovi 的 AI 代理人分析臨床資料以辨識照護需求、線上治療常見病症並尋找網內醫療機構，為雇主節省 10–20% 醫療支出。

summary.en: A trading platform for pre-IPO shares, equities, crypto, and perpetual futures.
summary.zh: 可交易 IPO 前股份、股票、加密貨幣與永續合約的交易平台。

highlight.en: Freeport's AI analysts turn trusted social and financial media into a real-time feed of market-moving news and actionable trade ideas.
highlight.zh: Freeport 的 AI 分析師將可信的社群與財經媒體轉化為即時動態，提供撼動市場的新聞與可執行的交易構想。

summary.en: AI agents that recover lost revenue through real customer conversations.
summary.zh: 透過真實顧客對話挽回流失營收的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Boom runs proactive outbound conversations over SMS, email, WhatsApp, or phone to win back churned users and re-engage drop-offs in their own language.
highlight.zh: Boom 透過簡訊、電子郵件、WhatsApp 或電話以顧客的母語主動展開外撥對話，挽回流失用戶並重新喚回中途離開者。

summary.en: Software that gives robots a social brain so they can listen, speak, and act.
summary.zh: 為機器人賦予社交大腦的軟體，讓它們能聆聽、說話與行動。

highlight.en: Working with manufacturers like Unitree, Lightberry lets users program robots out of the box just by talking to them, with no coding required.
highlight.zh: Lightberry 與 Unitree 等製造商合作，讓使用者開箱即可用對話的方式為機器人編程，完全不需寫程式。

summary.en: AI-powered market due diligence for investment decisions.
summary.zh: 為投資決策提供 AI 驅動的市場盡職調查。

highlight.en: DiligenceSquared automates the $500K McKinsey-style market diligence report with AI agents that conduct expert interviews and link every claim to source transcripts.
highlight.zh: DiligenceSquared 以 AI 代理人自動化要價 50 萬美元的麥肯錫式市場盡職調查報告，能進行專家訪談並將每項論點連結至原始逐字稿。

summary.en: Continuous offensive security combining automated testing and human red teams.
summary.zh: 結合自動化測試與人類紅隊的持續性攻擊性資安服務。

highlight.en: Antigen maps and exploits an enterprise's attack surface via nightly automated tests and monthly human red teams, delivering findings with reproduction steps in GitHub or Linear.
highlight.zh: Antigen 以每晚自動測試與每月人類紅隊測繪並利用企業的攻擊面，並在 GitHub 或 Linear 中附上重現步驟交付發現。

summary.en: A no-code platform to build and publish mobile apps by chatting with AI.
summary.zh: 透過與 AI 對話即可打造並發布行動應用的無程式碼平台。

highlight.en: Fastshot lets anyone go from idea to the App Stores within minutes just by chatting with AI, with no coding required.
highlight.zh: Fastshot 讓任何人只需與 AI 對話，數分鐘內就能從構想做到上架 App Store，完全不需寫程式。

summary.en: End-to-end simulation infrastructure for defense autonomy.
summary.zh: 面向國防自主系統的端到端模擬基礎設施。

highlight.en: Null Labs gives defense companies simulation infrastructure to train and validate autonomous systems.
highlight.zh: Null Labs 為國防企業提供模擬基礎設施，用以訓練並驗證自主系統。

summary.en: An AI-native insurance brokerage combining AI with licensed brokers.
summary.zh: 結合 AI 與持牌經紀人的 AI 原生保險經紀公司。

highlight.en: Fernstone pairs AI with licensed brokers to secure complex insurance faster and at better terms, already managing risk for 100+ construction, security, and trades businesses.
highlight.zh: Fernstone 結合 AI 與持牌經紀人，更快以更佳條件取得複雜保險，目前已為 100 多家營造、保全與技工業者管理風險。

summary.en: A music app that lets anyone make song mashups without knowing how to DJ.
summary.zh: 讓任何人不會 DJ 也能製作歌曲混搭的音樂應用。

highlight.en: Mixy instantly blends vocals and beats of any song into shareable mashups; it launched to #1 in Music, reaching 1.5M users and 15M mashups in three months.
highlight.zh: Mixy 能即時混合任何歌曲的人聲與節奏，做出可分享的混搭作品；上線即登上音樂類榜首，三個月達 150 萬用戶與 1,500 萬首混搭。

summary.en: AI agents that streamline prescription refills and workload for pharmacies.
summary.zh: 為藥局簡化處方續配與工作負擔的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Remedy uses intelligent automation to streamline prescription refills, reduce pharmacy workload, and enhance patient care.
highlight.zh: Remedy 運用智慧自動化簡化處方續配、減輕藥局工作負擔並提升病患照護。

summary.en: A tool that lets developers build an API to interact with any website.
summary.zh: 讓開發者為任何網站建立互動 API 的工具。

highlight.en: Instead of slow headless browsers, Parse examines a website's underlying network requests to auto-generate API endpoints, making it 10–100x faster and cheaper than browser automation.
highlight.zh: Parse 不依賴緩慢的無頭瀏覽器，而是檢視網站底層的網路請求自動產生 API 端點，因此比瀏覽器自動化快上並便宜 10–100 倍。

summary.en: An AI property manager that automates maintenance for landlords and estate agents.
summary.zh: 為房東與房仲自動化維修事務的 AI 物業管理員。

highlight.en: London-based Brickwise handles tenant calls and messages 24/7, chases contractors, and resolves maintenance issues for over 10 customers worldwide.
highlight.zh: 總部位於倫敦的 Brickwise 全天候處理租客來電與訊息、追蹤承包商並解決維修問題，客戶遍及全球逾十家。

summary.en: A platform that helps companies build specialized AI agents.
summary.zh: 協助企業打造專用 AI 代理人的平台。

highlight.en: Sylvian focuses on helping companies build specialized, purpose-built AI agents.
highlight.zh: Sylvian 專注於協助企業打造針對特定用途的專用 AI 代理人。

summary.en: A no-code tool that lets non-technical teams build AI agents without engineers.
summary.zh: 讓非技術團隊無需工程師即可打造 AI 代理人的無程式碼工具。

highlight.en: Nexus enables non-technical teams in large organizations to build production-ready AI agents without writing code.
highlight.zh: Nexus 讓大型組織中的非技術團隊無需寫程式即可打造可上線的 AI 代理人。

summary.en: AI agents that automate regulatory submissions for life sciences.
summary.zh: 為生命科學自動化法規送件的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Scoop automates the manual document consolidation and prep for IND submissions, which today take biotechs months before reaching their first-in-human trial.
highlight.zh: Scoop 自動化 IND 送件所需的人工文件彙整與準備，而這道流程目前讓生技公司在進入首次人體試驗前須耗費數月。

summary.en: Payment infrastructure that lets AI agents transact within defined guardrails.
summary.zh: 讓 AI 代理人在既定規範內進行交易的支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: Locus connects agents securely to funds with per-transaction permissions and limits, making every payment traceable, auditable, and reconcilable with existing financial stacks.
highlight.zh: Locus 以每筆交易的權限與額度將代理人安全連結至資金，讓每筆支付皆可追蹤、稽核並與既有財務系統對帳。

summary.en: Observability that monitors AI agents and surfaces user behavior patterns.
summary.zh: 監控 AI 代理人並呈現用戶行為模式的可觀測性工具。

highlight.en: The Context Company analyzes agent conversations to surface silent failures and behavior patterns through topic clustering and feedback analysis, alongside traces, latency, and cost.
highlight.zh: The Context Company 分析代理人對話，透過主題分群與回饋分析揭露隱性失敗與行為模式，並結合追蹤、延遲與成本等指標。

summary.en: A production layer that lets developers deploy AI agents as API endpoints.
summary.zh: 讓開發者將 AI 代理人部署為 API 端點的正式環境層。

highlight.en: dari.dev deploys agents as API endpoints with built-in tools, sandboxes, and durable execution, so agents maintain state, run long workflows, and retry automatically.
highlight.zh: dari.dev 將代理人部署為附帶內建工具、沙箱與持久執行的 API 端點，讓代理人能維持狀態、執行長時工作流並自動重試。

summary.en: An AI assistant that runs back-office operations for freight carriers.
summary.zh: 為貨運業者運行後勤營運的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Lunavo plugs into a carrier's existing toolstack to run end-to-end back-office operations, resolving issues autonomously and escalating only what matters.
highlight.zh: Lunavo 接入貨運業者既有的工具堆疊，端到端運行後勤營運，自主解決問題並僅在必要時上呈。

summary.en: Software that automates equipment operations for nursing facilities.
summary.zh: 為護理機構自動化設備營運的軟體。

highlight.en: Norra uses physical trackers and AI agents to give nursing facilities visibility over medical equipment, targeting the $15B lost annually to equipment waste.
highlight.zh: Norra 以實體追蹤器與 AI 代理人讓護理機構掌握醫療設備狀況，瞄準每年因設備浪費而損失的 150 億美元。

summary.en: A ChatGPT-style assistant for finding value bets in sports betting.
summary.zh: ChatGPT 風格的助理，用於找出運動博弈中的價值投注。

highlight.en: Bron finds positive-expected-value bets across 150+ sportsbooks and prediction markets, builds parlays automatically, and surfaces the day's best bets in seconds.
highlight.zh: Bron 在 150 多家運動博彩商與預測市場中找出正期望值投注、自動組合連注，並在數秒內呈現當日最佳投注。

summary.en: An AI-run performance marketing agency that grows brands across social platforms.
summary.zh: 以 AI 運營的成效行銷代理商，跨社群平台壯大品牌。

highlight.en: Tell if AI deploys autonomous agents on a fleet of real phones to create, post, and grow content across hundreds of accounts on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and more, paid on revenue share.
highlight.zh: Tell if AI 在一批真實手機上部署自主代理人，於 YouTube、TikTok、Instagram 等平台以數百個帳號創作、發布並壯大內容，並以營收分潤收費。

summary.en: A tool that identifies churn risk and helps companies stay close to users at scale.
summary.zh: 辨識流失風險、協助企業大規模貼近用戶的工具。

highlight.en: Minro plugs into a company's analytics stack, enriches each user with role and social profiles at ~80% accuracy, and flags those most likely to churn from behavioral patterns.
highlight.zh: Minro 接入企業的分析堆疊，以約 80% 準確率為每位用戶補上職務與社群資料，並依行為模式標記最可能流失的用戶。

summary.en: A full-stack AI accounting firm automating reconciliation, tax, and analysis.
summary.zh: 全端 AI 會計事務所，自動化對帳、稅務與財務分析。

highlight.en: Cranston targets the $900B accounting labor market with software that pulls context from a company's apps, connects to systems of record, and handles repetitive accounting work.
highlight.zh: Cranston 瞄準 9,000 億美元的會計人力市場，其軟體可從公司各應用擷取脈絡、連接記錄系統並處理重複性會計工作。

summary.en: A shared context layer that syncs AI conversations across providers for teams and agents.
summary.zh: 跨供應商同步 AI 對話、供團隊與代理人共用的共享脈絡層。

highlight.en: Nessie auto-syncs conversations from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more into a queryable, shareable context layer so AI-assisted thinking compounds instead of starting from zero each session.
highlight.zh: Nessie 自動同步 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 等對話，匯入可查詢、可分享的脈絡層，讓 AI 輔助的思考能持續累積，而非每次從零開始。

summary.en: AI filmmaking software for creating high-quality short films end-to-end.
summary.zh: 端到端製作高品質短片的 AI 影視創作軟體。

highlight.en: Founded by an award-winning filmmaker and an early Instagram engineer, Flick offers a Figma-like interface for coherent AI films; four of its shorts have won 20+ festival awards.
highlight.zh: 由獲獎電影人與 Instagram 早期工程師創立，Flick 提供 Figma 般的介面製作連貫的 AI 短片，旗下四部短片已贏得 20 多項影展獎項。

summary.en: Custom AI agents for contractors, manufacturers, and logistics companies.
summary.zh: 為承包商、製造商與物流公司打造的客製化 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Semble builds AI agents trained on how a business actually runs and plugged into the tools the team already uses, founded by Stanford CS graduates.
highlight.zh: Semble 打造依企業實際運作方式訓練、並接入團隊既有工具的 AI 代理人，由史丹佛資工畢業生創立。

summary.en: An AI command-and-control platform delivering situational awareness in tactical settings.
summary.zh: 在戰術環境中提供態勢感知的 AI 指揮控制平台。

highlight.en: Lakonia transcribes and analyzes radio communications for law enforcement and the military, synthesizing information for commanders, dispatchers, and operators to act on.
highlight.zh: Lakonia 為執法與軍事單位轉錄並分析無線電通訊，將資訊綜整供指揮官、調度員與操作人員據以行動。

summary.en: An AI-native go-to-market platform for teams selling to the physical economy.
summary.zh: 為向實體經濟銷售的團隊打造的 AI 原生市場進入平台。

highlight.en: Terrain is an AI-native GTM platform tailored for teams selling to the physical economy, such as contractors and restaurants.
highlight.zh: Terrain 是專為向實體經濟（如承包商、餐廳）銷售的團隊打造的 AI 原生市場進入平台。

summary.en: An API for parsing multimodal, unstructured documents into LLM-ready data.
summary.zh: 將多模態、非結構化文件解析為 LLM 可用資料的 API。

highlight.en: Unsiloed's vision models parse text, tables, images, and charts for startups and NASDAQ-listed enterprises, outperforming LlamaIndex, Gemini, Mistral, and Unstructured.io on public benchmarks.
highlight.zh: Unsiloed 的視覺模型為新創與 NASDAQ 上市企業解析文字、表格、圖像與圖表，並在公開基準上勝過 LlamaIndex、Gemini、Mistral 與 Unstructured.io。

summary.en: Expert-level STEM reasoning data created for training frontier AI labs.
summary.zh: 為前沿 AI 實驗室訓練而打造的專家級 STEM 推理資料。

highlight.en: Sciloop's math and physics problems are written by IPhO and IMO medalists, and top models like GPT 5.4 Pro and Gemini 3.1 Pro score just 0–5% on its hardest set.
highlight.zh: Sciloop 的數學與物理題目由國際物理與數學奧林匹亞獎牌得主出題，GPT 5.4 Pro 與 Gemini 3.1 Pro 等頂尖模型在其最難題組僅得 0–5 分。

summary.en: A redaction layer that removes sensitive data before prompts reach AI tools.
summary.zh: 在提示送出至 AI 工具前移除敏感資料的去識別層。

highlight.en: LogosGuard redacts private information on-device before a prompt ever leaves it, letting people use ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini without leaking sensitive data.
highlight.zh: LogosGuard 在提示離開裝置前即於本機去除私密資訊，讓使用者能安全使用 ChatGPT、Claude 與 Gemini 而不外洩敏感資料。

summary.en: An AI automation layer for platform engineering teams.
summary.zh: 為平台工程團隊打造的 AI 自動化層。

highlight.en: Kestrel turns natural-language prompts into deterministic workflows for incident response, provisioning, and CI/CD, with 25+ integrations, 140+ actions, a CLI, SDK, and MCP server.
highlight.zh: Kestrel 將自然語言提示轉為可預期的工作流，涵蓋事故處理、雲端配置與 CI/CD，並提供 25 種以上整合、140 多項動作及 CLI、SDK 與 MCP 伺服器。

summary.en: A proactive desktop AI copilot that transfers context across apps.
summary.zh: 可跨應用傳遞脈絡的主動式桌面 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Pitched as Clippy done right, Logical drafts emails, writes docs, and detects action items largely without prompting, and never sends user data to its servers.
highlight.zh: Logical 自詡為改良版的 Clippy，大多無需提示即可草擬郵件、撰寫文件並偵測待辦事項，且絕不將用戶資料傳送至其伺服器。

summary.en: An AI language buddy that teaches kids inside games they already play.
summary.zh: 在孩子愛玩的遊戲中陪伴教學的 AI 語言夥伴。

highlight.en: Aleph Lab's AI companion chats and plays with children inside games like Minecraft, turning their existing game time into language learning.
highlight.zh: Aleph Lab 的 AI 夥伴在 Minecraft 等遊戲中與孩子聊天、同樂，把既有的遊戲時間轉化為語言學習。

summary.en: Automatic clash detection for construction drawings before building starts.
summary.zh: 在開工前自動偵測施工圖衝突的工具。

highlight.en: Helonic analyzes PDF plans to detect clashes across architectural, structural, and MEP disciplines and drafts RFIs, helping teams resolve issues early and avoid costly rework.
highlight.zh: Helonic 分析 PDF 圖紙，跨建築、結構與機電專業偵測衝突並草擬 RFI，協助團隊及早解決問題、避免昂貴重工。

summary.en: An enterprise AI transformation platform.
summary.zh: 企業級 AI 轉型平台。

highlight.en: Redapto provides a platform to help enterprises adopt and scale AI across their organization.
highlight.zh: Redapto 提供平台，協助企業在組織內導入並擴展 AI。

summary.en: An AI operating system for home-services businesses, starting with customer communication.
summary.zh: 為居家服務業者打造的 AI 作業系統，以客戶溝通為切入點。

highlight.en: Bravi replaces the front office with AI agents that never miss a lead, starting in fenestration before expanding to adjacent trades, and is live across Europe and the US.
highlight.zh: Bravi 以絕不漏接商機的 AI 代理人取代前台，從門窗業切入再擴展至相鄰行業，目前已在歐洲與美國上線。

summary.en: A collaborative coding agent that asks before it acts.
summary.zh: 在行動前先徵詢的協作式程式碼代理人。

highlight.en: Compyle is a deliberately less autonomous coding agent that keeps engineers in the driver's seat, avoiding the unmaintainable black-box code that fully autonomous agents produce.
highlight.zh: Compyle 是刻意降低自主性的程式碼代理人，讓工程師掌握主導權，避免全自主代理人產出難以維護的黑箱程式碼。

summary.en: AI-powered banking that optimizes finances on a single platform.
summary.zh: 在單一平台優化財務的 AI 驅動銀行服務。

highlight.en: Selfin lets users connect all their financial products on one platform for personalized recommendations and optimizations, aiming to build the first AI bank.
highlight.zh: Selfin 讓用戶在單一平台連結所有金融產品以取得個人化建議與優化，目標是打造首家 AI 銀行。

summary.en: A browser where developers can code and orchestrate agents from their tabs.
summary.zh: 讓開發者能在分頁中寫程式並調度代理人的瀏覽器。

highlight.en: Sol lets developers orchestrate agents directly from browser tabs, where agents can see, navigate, and act on the workspace from a single place.
highlight.zh: Sol 讓開發者直接從瀏覽器分頁調度代理人，使代理人能在單一位置觀看、導覽並操作整個工作區。

summary.en: A platform where families turn kids' drawings and ideas into animated cartoons.
summary.zh: 讓家庭把孩子的塗鴉與點子變成動畫卡通的平台。

highlight.en: Pixley turns kids' drawings into personalized, ad-free animated cartoons built around Social-Emotional Learning lessons parents choose; the same tech powers a B2B studio service.
highlight.zh: Pixley 把孩子的塗鴉變成個人化、無廣告的動畫卡通，並圍繞家長選定的社會情緒學習主題；同一技術亦支撐其 B2B 工作室服務。

summary.en: An agentic platform that helps oncologists extract insights from CT scans.
summary.zh: 協助腫瘤科醫師從電腦斷層擷取洞見的代理式平台。

highlight.en: Nucleo helps oncologists and radiologists analyze CT scans for tumor characterization and treatment, working with hospitals including Stanford, Cedars-Sinai, and Weill Cornell.
highlight.zh: Nucleo 協助腫瘤科與放射科醫師分析電腦斷層以進行腫瘤特徵判讀與治療，合作醫院包括史丹佛、雪松-西奈與威爾康乃爾。

summary.en: Computer agents that automate finance tasks like reconciliation inside your systems.
summary.zh: 在你的系統內自動化對帳等財務工作的電腦代理人。

highlight.en: Zalos's agents log into existing ERP and accounting systems to run rule-based finance processes like pricing, billing, and month-end, even where legacy ERPs and portals block other automation.
highlight.zh: Zalos 的代理人登入既有 ERP 與會計系統，執行如定價、計費與月結等規則型財務流程，即便老舊 ERP 與入口網站阻擋了其他自動化方案。

summary.en: An AI agent that sells, onboards, and supports users through live walkthroughs.
summary.zh: 透過即時導覽銷售、引導與支援用戶的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Primer is an AI agent that automatically sells, onboards, and supports users through live, personalized product walkthroughs.
highlight.zh: Primer 是一款 AI 代理人，能透過即時、個人化的產品導覽自動完成銷售、上手引導與支援。

summary.en: A platform that lets coding agents write code and deploy the infrastructure to run it.
summary.zh: 讓程式碼代理人撰寫程式並部署其運行基礎設施的平台。

highlight.en: Specific connects to your coding agent so it can both write code and build deployment infrastructure, spinning up a full local environment in seconds and going to production in minutes.
highlight.zh: Specific 連接你的程式碼代理人，讓它既能寫程式也能建置部署基礎設施，數秒內啟動完整本機環境、數分鐘內上線正式環境。

summary.en: A tool that generates code from informal, meme-style workflows in your IDE.
summary.zh: 在你的 IDE 中從隨興迷因式工作流產生程式碼的工具。

highlight.en: Clad Labs offers free code generation from playful, brainrot-style workflows right inside the IDE.
highlight.zh: Clad Labs 在 IDE 內直接從輕鬆、迷因式的工作流提供免費的程式碼產生。

summary.en: Generalist speech models with in-context learning and instruction following.
summary.zh: 具備脈絡內學習與指令遵循能力的通用語音模型。

highlight.en: Kalpa Labs builds generalist speech models that unify speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice cloning while adding in-context learning and strong instruction following.
highlight.zh: Kalpa Labs 打造通用語音模型，統合語音轉文字、文字轉語音與語音克隆，並加入脈絡內學習與強大的指令遵循能力。

summary.en: A lab working on long-horizon autonomous research and coding agents.
summary.zh: 鑽研長時程自主研究與程式碼代理人的實驗室。

highlight.en: Arcten is a research lab focused on long-horizon autonomous research and coding agents.
highlight.zh: Arcten 是一間專注於長時程自主研究與程式碼代理人的研究實驗室。

summary.en: Production monitoring that catches silent, semantic failures in AI agents.
summary.zh: 捕捉 AI 代理人隱性語意失敗的正式環境監控工具。

highlight.en: Lemma scans every trace to catch the silent semantic failures observability tools miss—cases where an agent looks like it worked but didn't—identifying root causes before users complain.
highlight.zh: Lemma 掃描每一筆追蹤，捕捉一般可觀測性工具漏掉的隱性語意失敗，即代理人看似成功實則失敗的情況，並在用戶抱怨前找出根因。

summary.en: A marketplace for complex hobbies, starting with Warhammer.
summary.zh: 面向複雜嗜好的市集，以戰錘（Warhammer）為起點。

highlight.en: Miniswap solves messy listings and counterfeits in hobbies like Warhammer with a catalogue of 20,000+ miniatures that sellers match against to give buyers structure.
highlight.zh: Miniswap 以逾兩萬件微縮模型的目錄解決戰錘等嗜好中雜亂的刊登與仿冒問題，賣家對照目錄上架，讓買家有結構可循。

summary.en: An AI support and operations platform tailored for hardware companies.
summary.zh: 為硬體公司量身打造的 AI 支援與營運平台。

highlight.en: Telemetron unifies ticketing, device diagnostics, order tracking, and documentation for hardware, with AI agents that connect directly to devices and backend systems.
highlight.zh: Telemetron 為硬體整合工單、裝置診斷、訂單追蹤與文件，並以可直接連接裝置與後端系統的 AI 代理人提供服務。

summary.en: A real-time web intelligence API for AI agents and go-to-market teams.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理人與市場進入團隊打造的即時網路情報 API。

highlight.en: The Hog unifies people data, company data, search, news, and scraping behind one credit-based API, with waterfall logic that replaces stitching together Clay, Apollo, Exa, and Tavily.
highlight.zh: The Hog 將人物資料、公司資料、搜尋、新聞與爬取整合於單一信用制 API，並以瀑布式路由取代拼湊 Clay、Apollo、Exa 與 Tavily 的做法。

summary.en: A Canva-like AI engine for creating short-form video ads.
summary.zh: 用於製作短影音廣告的 Canva 風格 AI 引擎。

highlight.en: Bluma automates the entire consumer marketing pipeline—planning, scripting, producing, and editing—by cloning competitors' viral videos end-to-end at scale.
highlight.zh: Bluma 透過端到端複製競爭對手的爆紅影片，大規模自動化整套消費者行銷流程，涵蓋企劃、腳本、製作與剪輯。

summary.en: A unified API for prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket.
summary.zh: 整合 Kalshi 與 Polymarket 等預測市場的單一 API。

highlight.en: Dome's unified API gives developers live and historical data across prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi, including granular datasets not available natively, to trade and build through one interface.
highlight.zh: Dome 的單一 API 讓開發者透過一個介面取得 Polymarket、Kalshi 等預測市場的即時與歷史資料，包含原生無法取得的細緻資料集，以進行交易與開發。

summary.en: AI agents for trade compliance that help companies manage tariffs.
summary.zh: 協助企業管理關稅的貿易合規 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: MarkIt's agents work inside the tools trade professionals already use—Excel, PDFs, broker portals—handling classification, ACE report audits, and a self-updating system of record.
highlight.zh: MarkIt 的代理人在貿易專業人員既有的 Excel、PDF 與報關入口等工具中運作，處理稅則分類、ACE 報表稽核與可自我更新的記錄系統。

summary.en: Audio and enterprise human datasets representative of real-world business work.
summary.zh: 代表真實企業內部工作的音訊與企業級人類資料集。

highlight.en: Specific Labs builds audio and enterprise datasets that reflect work inside real businesses, easing the data bottleneck holding back the next frontier of AGI.
highlight.zh: Specific Labs 打造反映真實企業內部工作的音訊與企業級資料集，緩解阻礙下一代 AGI 的資料瓶頸。

summary.en: Infrastructure to build your own software factory with cloud coding agents.
summary.zh: 以雲端程式碼代理人打造自有軟體工廠的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Amika gives teams sandboxed cloud coding agents—the kind Ramp, Coinbase, and Stripe built in-house—that ship real PRs with live previews from a web UI, CLI, Slack, or API.
highlight.zh: Amika 為團隊提供沙箱化的雲端程式碼代理人，正是 Ramp、Coinbase 與 Stripe 自建的那類，可從網頁、CLI、Slack 或 API 提交附即時預覽的真實 PR。

summary.en: An AI HR plug-in that automates immigration screening and compliance.
summary.zh: 自動化移民篩查與合規的 AI 人資外掛。

highlight.en: Mayflower parses documents, classifies visa pathways, and generates attorney-ready forms, integrating with HR systems to surface only compliant global candidates.
highlight.zh: Mayflower 解析文件、判別簽證途徑並產出律師可用的表單，並整合人資系統，僅呈現符合資格的全球候選人。

summary.en: Building the first in-orbit fusion power source for large-scale industry in space.
summary.zh: 打造首座在軌融合電源，支撐太空中的大規模工業。

highlight.en: Founded by former Lawrence Livermore and Oak Ridge physicists, Zephyr is designing a megawatt-class magnetic confinement fusion reactor for space at a fraction of solar's cost.
highlight.zh: 由勞倫斯利佛摩與橡樹嶺前物理學家創立，Zephyr 正設計適用於太空的百萬瓦級磁約束融合反應爐，成本僅為等效太陽能的一小部分。

summary.en: Localhost service isolation and orchestration for git worktrees.
summary.zh: 為 git worktree 提供本機服務隔離與調度。

highlight.en: Coasts give each git worktree its own fully isolated runtime, letting multiple AI coding agents build and test in parallel without clashing ports or duplicated databases.
highlight.zh: Coasts 為每個 git worktree 提供完全隔離的執行環境，讓多個 AI 程式碼代理人能並行開發與測試，而不會出現連接埠衝突或資料庫重複。

summary.en: Efference is an early-stage industrials startup from YC's Fall 2025 batch.
summary.zh: Efference 是來自 YC 2025 年秋季梯次的早期工業領域新創。

highlight.en: Efference is an industrials company in YC's Fall 2025 batch; further public details about its product are not yet available.
highlight.zh: Efference 是 YC 2025 年秋季梯次的工業領域公司，其產品的更多公開資訊尚未揭露。

summary.en: A robotics intelligence system for metal fabrication, starting with welding.
summary.zh: 面向金屬製造的機器人智慧系統，以焊接為起點。

highlight.en: Forge Robotics builds a robot-mounted vision system with AI feature detection that creates a real-time 3D map, guiding the arm to take raw metal stock to fully welded parts.
highlight.zh: Forge Robotics 打造機械臂搭載的視覺系統，以 AI 特徵偵測建立即時 3D 地圖，引導機械臂將原料金屬加工為完整焊接的零件。

summary.en: An AI autopilot that automates infrastructure permitting and regulatory compliance.
summary.zh: 自動化基礎設施許可與法規合規的 AI 自動駕駛系統。

highlight.en: Nerviom automates the hundreds of permits and approvals that data centers, factories, and energy facilities need, replacing consultants and spreadsheets to cut years and millions from timelines.
highlight.zh: Nerviom 自動化資料中心、工廠與能源設施所需的數百項許可與核准，取代顧問與試算表，為專案時程省下數年與數百萬美元。

summary.en: An AI transformation partner that deploys AI safely for regulated institutions.
summary.zh: 為受監管機構安全部署 AI 的轉型夥伴。

highlight.en: Soren helps regulated institutions identify, deploy, and operate AI across high-impact workflows, delivering outcomes faster and cheaper than traditional consulting firms.
highlight.zh: Soren 協助受監管機構在高影響力工作流中辨識、部署並運行 AI，以比傳統顧問公司更快、更省的方式達成成果。

summary.en: Everest is an early-stage consumer startup from YC's Fall 2025 batch.
summary.zh: Everest 是來自 YC 2025 年秋季梯次的早期消費領域新創。

highlight.en: Everest is a consumer company in YC's Fall 2025 batch building toward AGI; further public details are not yet available.
highlight.zh: Everest 是 YC 2025 年秋季梯次中朝向 AGI 發展的消費領域公司，更多公開資訊尚未揭露。

summary.en: Open-source general-purpose robots for unsafe, repetitive, or boring tasks.
summary.zh: 用於不安全、重複或枯燥工作的開源通用型機器人。

highlight.en: Philon is building open-source general-purpose robots designed to take on unsafe, repetitive, or boring tasks.
highlight.zh: Philon 正打造開源通用型機器人，專門承擔不安全、重複或枯燥的工作。

summary.en: A visual editor that lets product designers ship UI changes in production code.
summary.zh: 讓產品設計師將 UI 變更直接推送至正式程式碼的視覺化編輯器。

highlight.en: Rivet lets designers make UI changes and ship them directly to the codebase, replacing slow designer–engineer collaboration; design-led YC companies are already customers.
highlight.zh: Rivet 讓設計師做出 UI 變更並直接推送至程式碼庫，取代設計師與工程師之間緩慢的協作；以設計為核心的 YC 公司已是其客戶。

summary.en: An elite AI law firm for high-growth companies across commercial and corporate law.
summary.zh: 為高成長公司提供商業與公司法服務的頂尖 AI 法律事務所。

highlight.en: General Legal delivers top-of-market commercial, corporate, and employment legal work at speeds and prices that undercut traditional law firms.
highlight.zh: General Legal 以遠勝傳統事務所的速度與價格，提供頂尖的商業、公司與勞動法務服務。

summary.en: One API for identity and fraud—KYC, KYB, AML, biometrics, and more.
summary.zh: 整合 KYC、KYB、AML 與生物辨識等身分與詐欺防護的單一 API。

highlight.en: Didit unifies KYC, KYB, AML, biometrics, and fraud into one API powered by 1,000+ data sources and 200+ signals, integrating in minutes with 500 free checks a month.
highlight.zh: Didit 將 KYC、KYB、AML、生物辨識與詐欺防護整合於單一 API，背後有逾千個資料來源與 200 多項訊號，可在數分鐘內串接，每月提供 500 次免費查核。

summary.en: Building AGI that can innovate by blending pattern recognition and formal reasoning.
summary.zh: 結合模式辨識與形式推理，打造能創新的 AGI。

highlight.en: Ndea is building frontier AI that unifies intuitive pattern recognition with formal reasoning, aiming for systems capable of independent invention to accelerate scientific progress.
highlight.zh: Ndea 正打造融合直覺式模式辨識與形式推理的前沿 AI，目標是能獨立發明、加速科學進展的系統。

summary.en: A premium hardware and software AI voice recorder for taking notes in the real world.
summary.zh: 用於在真實世界記錄筆記的高階軟硬整合 AI 語音記錄器。

highlight.en: Pocket builds a premium hardware-plus-software AI voice recorder for real-world note-taking, scaling fast across the US and European markets.
highlight.zh: Pocket 打造高階軟硬整合的 AI 語音記錄器以在真實世界記錄筆記，並在美國與歐洲市場快速擴張。
